title: Aether Adornments
description: A texture pack that changes the design of the rings of the Aether to match the style of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
body:
![Aether Adornments](https://i.imgur.com/0aJt4Bb.png)
# About:
Aether Adornments is a texture pack that modifies the design of the rings of the Aether mod and some of his addons to follow the same style as the rings of Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.

ℹ️ Important: This pack only affects the texture of the item icons.
It does not change world models, blocks, or gameplay mechanics.

![Before & After](https://i.imgur.com/YKSduh2.png)

![Comparative](https://i.imgur.com/WzY2KZ8.png)
# Main Changes:
- 22 items redesigned.
- Old textures replaced with a fresh vanilla style to match with Iron's Spellbooks.
- Compatibility with Deep Aether and Ancient Aether.
# FAQ:
❔ Will this pack break my game or the mod?
- ✅ No. This is a standard resource pack that only modifies visual elements and is completely safe to use.

❔ Do I need OptiFine?
- ✅ No. The pack works perfectly without OptiFine.
# Credits
- This resource pack was made with Iron's Gems 'n Jewelry as a reference for the rings.
- Special credits for the dev team of the Aether mod for make one of the greatest mods of Minecraft, all the rights deserve to them.
